Answer: Proper fraction → Numerator less than denominator

Set B: Numerator greater than or equal to denominator
Answer: Improper fraction → Numerator greater than or equal to denominator

Set B: Combination of whole number and proper fraction
Answer: Mixed fraction → Combination of whole number and proper fraction
Equivalent fractions → Different fractions with same value
Improper fraction to mixed fraction → Divide numerator by denominator
Addition of like fractions → Add numerators only
